17907.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
17907.description: Stanley Tucci eats and drinks his way around Milan, enjoying an aperitivo, feels inspired to make pizzoccheri, and enjoys classic Milanese - veal chops and risotto.

17920.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
17920.description: Stanley Tucci explores his former home, Tuscany, with a wine bar crawl, celebrating the importance of the lowly loaf and samples dishes which use stale bread as the key ingredient.

63395.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
63395.description: Stanley Tucci visits Sicily. Here, Stanley tries a salty crunchy sensation, tastes the grapes grown in the region's unique soils, and reflects on Sicilian hospitality.
